title: Forged in War
description: A simple mod that implements zinc ore which when combined with copper can make brass to make unique weapons for battle
body:
A very simple Fabric and NeoForge mod that adds zinc and brass materials that can make an assortment of items, but the main focus is the weapons.

Currently there is not much to this mod but there will be more to come in the future.
Current weapons include the **Brass Battle Axe, Brass Glaive, Brass Knuckles,** and **Longbow**

- The **Brass Battle axe** is perfect for close combat but not too close as it does decent damage while being able to hit from farther away than normal.
- The **Brass Glaive** has the length of a spear and does good damage with a short cooldown.
- The **Brass Knuckles** are for really close combat and deal a slightly smaller amount of damage with less range but make up for it in it's speedy cooldown.
- The **Longbow** is essentially just a bow but the arrows it fires have more velocity which gives it less drop-off over time and do more damage making it much more accurate and powerful than a normal bow.
